claiming_only.label: Claiming Only
claiming_only.desc: Same but claiming races only — tightest fig reliability

refined.label: Refined (fig≥90, gap≥8)
refined.desc: Tighter filters: fig floor 90, gap 8pt, skip 8-12/1 dead zone

wed_sat_claiming.label: Wed/Sat Claiming
wed_sat_claiming.desc: Wednesday + Saturday claiming races only — schedule edge

market_disagrees.label: Market Disagrees
market_disagrees.desc: Top fig horse is NOT the ML favorite — consensus divergence

value_zone.label: Value Zone (5-8/1)
value_zone.desc: Only bet when odds are 5/1–8/1 — sweet spot in the data
